title: Cabbage Quesadilla Fritters
description: A Mexican-inspired twist on traditional quesadillas, featuring fermented cabbage as a key ingredient. These crispy fritters make for a delicious snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, chopped onion, minced garlic, cumin, chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the cut tortillas to the bowl and mix until the cabbage mixture is evenly distributed.
Heat 1/4 cup of corn oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the cabbage-tortilla mixture into the skillet and flatten slightly.
Cook the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
